title: Mahabharatham
desc: A dynastic struggle between the collateral branches of the Kuru clan, the Kauravas and Pandavas, for the throne of Hastinapur leads to the Kurukshetra War.

title: Start Music
desc: Television actors and celebrities form teams and perform various musical tasks assigned to them by the host to win the prize.

title: Thendral Vandhu Ennai Thodum Classics
desc: Young lovers Thendral and Arjun navigate emotional conflicts and family opposition as their relationship faces countless trials.

title: Bagyalakshmi Classics
desc: Strong-willed Bagyalakshmi faces family challenges and emotional trials while protecting her loved ones with patience and resilience.

title: Mahanadhi Sagodharigalin Kadhai
desc: After the loss of their father, four sisters try to rebuild their lives and make a place for themselves in society along with their mother.

title: Azhagae Azhagu
desc: Married into a male-dominated household, two polar opposites, a conventional woman and a modern one, challenge the norms.

title: Siragadikka Aasai
desc: Meena, a woman from a broken family and Muthukumar, a man with a troubled past, face various difficulties in their marriage challenged by their difficult backgrounds and personal struggles.

title: Ayyanar Thunai
desc: A newly married woman strives to overcome multiple challenges in her husband's house, where he lives with his four brothers and father.

title: Pandian Stores Thanthai Sol Mikka Mandhiram Illai
desc: Three brothers, who are unmarried and lazy, struggle to lead a happy life. However, their strict father has a different perception of life, leading to humorous events.

title: Dhanam - Ungalil Oruthi
desc: A newly married couple discusses their aspirations and desires. However, in an unfortunate turn of events, the husband dies, leaving the wife as the sole breadwinner for the family.

title: Kanmani Anbudan
desc: The bond of Kanmani and Vennila, two close friends, undergoes a tough trial when they both fall in love with the same person.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
desc: Ilamathi, a courageous and kind-hearted girl, gets caught in the middle of chaos when a daring cop and a reckless goon express their affection towards her.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare Oru Chinanjiru Kuyilin Kadhai
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Azhagae Azhagu
desc: Married into a male-dominated household, two polar opposites, a conventional woman and a modern one, challenge the norms.

title: Chinna Marumagal Panirendaam Vaguppu
desc: A woman's aspiration to study medicine is obstructed by societal traditions after her betrothal to a wealthy patriarch's son.

title: Sindhu Bairavi Kacheri Arambam
desc: Drama and sparks unleash when Sindhu and Bairavi, two sisters who are worlds apart, end up getting married to unexpected partners.

title: Bharathi Kannamma
desc: An emotional episode as Bharathi and Kannamma face moral dilemmas and sacrifices during Sendra Vaaram, redefining love, loss, and destiny.

title: Naagin
desc: The discovery of the Mantra book puts Ahana on guard against a growing Chengistani threat. With war on the horizon, Aryaman warns the nation and coordinates a response with the military force.
